scope: Prepare and validate a primitive-profile path for split-compressed sparse MLA backward, then attempt the Flash S=4096 one-MI350 timing probe.

code_changes.read: The probe now profiles split-compressed branches instead of returning a skipped primitive profile, and the launcher exposes probe-sparse-mla-backward-4096 with SPARSE_MLA_BWD_* controls.

small_cpu_validation.note: CPU timing is not performance evidence; this only validates the split primitive-profile logic and correctness plumbing.

flash_s4096_gpu_probe_attempt.command: RUN_TAG=sparse_mla_split_primitive_flash_s4096_20260531 SPARSE_MLA_BWD_VARIANT=split-compressed-triton-softmax SPARSE_MLA_BWD_ITERS=5 SPARSE_MLA_BWD_PRIMITIVE_PROFILE=true SPARSE_MLA_BWD_CHECK_VARIANTS=retained WAIT_IDLE_SECONDS=120 bash experiments/2026-05-27-deepseek-v4-amd-pretrain/tools/dsv4_layer_microbench/run_retained_mi350_suite.sh probe-sparse-mla-backward-4096
flash_s4096_gpu_probe_attempt.reason: Idle guard timed out on do-sonle-kernel before staging/running the GPU timing probe.

blocking_processes_observed.cmd: python /exp/tools/dsv4_coda_attention_layer_gate.py --m-values 64 --groups 1 --cache-seqlen 512 --cache-stride 0 --page-size 256 --block-n 128 --num-split 1 --q-absorb-backend gemm --q-partials-handoff partials --q-absorb-direct-backend sumsq-gemm --mla-kv-format qfp8-block-prepacked --mla-value-group-tiles 8 --post-tail-mode none --skip-bench --aiter-root /exp/sources/wip/aiter --aiter-aot-import --json-output /exp/artifacts/dsv4_coda_qfp8_gate_20260531/smoke/gate_qfp8_prepacked_M64_S512.json

python /exp/tools/dsv4_coda_attention_layer_gate.py --m-values 512 --groups 1 --cache-seqlen 8192 --cache-stride 0 --page-size 256 --block-n 128 --num-split 1 --q-absorb-backend gemm --q-partials-handoff partials --q-absorb-direct-backend sumsq-gemm --mla-kv-format qfp8-block-prepacked --mla-value-group-tiles 8 --post-tail-mode none --skip-bench --profile-stage coda-mla-consume --profile-warmup 3 --profile-iters 20 --aiter-root /exp/sources/wip/aiter --aiter-aot-import --json-output /exp/artifacts/dsv4_coda_qfp8_gate_20260531/smoke/gate_qfp8_prepacked_M512_S8192_profile.json

flash_s4096_gpu_probe_attempt.decision: Do not co-schedule this timing-sensitive sparse MLA backward probe over root-owned Coda attention gates. Retry the same command when do-sonle-kernel is idle.

next_actions: Retry probe-sparse-mla-backward-4096 when do-sonle-kernel has no non-gpuagent KFD processes.
Use the resulting primitive profile to decide whether the next sparse MLA work is softmax split fusion, compressed branch gradient accumulation, q/dKV accumulation, or sink-gradient reduction.
